title: AI in EMC: A Systematic Literature Corpus
description: Curated and annotated corpus of 285 research articles on artificial intelligence in electromagnetic compatibility and adjacent electromagnetic domains (123 core-layer + 162 adjacent-layer articles), with a two-layer taxonomy, per-article annotations (core claim, results, limitations), and an analysis workbook. Accompanies the review article 'Artificial Intelligence in Electromagnetic Compatibility and Related Electromagnetic Domains: A Systematic Review'.
